title: go.sum integrity verification failure — checksum mismatch
violated_rule: go.mod/go.sum integrity verified — go mod verify passes
expected_feedback: P1 Critical: go.sum integrity failure — cached module content does not match recorded checksums. This could indicate supply chain tampering. Clear module cache (go clean -modcache), re-download, and re-verify. If mismatch persists, investigate the module source.
